#include <iostream> using namespace std;  struct node {  int data;  node *next; };  class linked_list { private:  node *head,*tail; public:  linked_list()  {  head = NULL;  tail = NULL;  }   void add_node(int n)  {  node *tmp = new node;  tmp->data = n;  tmp->next = NULL;   if(head == NULL)  {  head = tmp;  tail = tmp;  }  else  {  tail->next = tmp;  tail = tail->next;  }  } };  int main() {  linked_list a;  a.add_node(1);  a.add_node(2);  return 0; } Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
